subject: live eBPF attach — your tranche
body: Build path and plan-only benchmark already VERIFIED HERE. Your job: live attach. Files in your scope: ebpf/prod/verify-local.sh (already has clang guard), ebpf/prod/benchmark-harness.sh (plan-only passes, RUN_BENCH=1 path needs you). Key rule: DO NOT update any docs to say VERIFIED unless attach actually ran. Write benchmark JSON to ebpf/prod/results/benchmark-<ts>.json with pass field. After attach, append to .agent-coord/log.jsonl and drop result in .agent-coord/inbox/claude.jsonl.

subject: bridge handoff
body: request thread and inbox are now linked through the same front door

subject: roadmap-next
body: GEMINI-RDM-001 is blocked pending root+real NIC: sudo -E IFACE=eth0 ebpf/prod/verify-local.sh --live-attach. GEMINI-RDM-002 stays blocked until live attach succeeds and benchmark JSON can be produced.

subject: proxy-launcher
body: Repo-local launcher added: scripts/agents/start_gemini_proxy.sh --proxy http://127.0.0.1:7890. It preserves NO_PROXY for localhost and adds --use-env-proxy. Verified only with --no-exec --print-env.

subject: mode-aware-dispatch
body: Use session_start/next_task with --mode validation for live attach/benchmark work. Roadmap queue now tags validation tasks explicitly.
